Text.Page:
What endangers the relics? Why do the monsters hate them so? What protects them? Will you protect them?

I've developed a serum that will transfer the relic's protection to you. Do you want some Transference Serum?

I'll prepare you a batch of serum. Do you know when to use it?

Did you think this was the only difficulty you'll face? While I work on this, why not ask Feilia to explain the Cataclysm Machine?
The serum is ready. Will you put it to good use? It's not easy to make, so don't waste it.
